name: YouMod Repo
subtitle: Automated YouMod builds for Signulous
description: Auto-built YouMod IPA — updated whenever a new YouTube version is available.

apps.name: YouMod
apps.subtitle: YouTube with YouMod tweaks
apps.localizedDescription: YouMod brings back YTLite-style features: ad removal, background playback, UI customisation, and more — without a paywall.

versions.localizedDescription:
YouTube 21.18.4 + YouMod v1.2.3

## Changelog
- Adds the hide Shorts shelf option back and Cleanup. (#52)
- Adds a option to replace next/previous buttons with forward/backward buttons.
- Adds a option to disable hints.
- Adds a option to forcibly enables miniplayer (especially kid videos).
- Adds a option to always show seekbar in fullscreen mode.
- Update French translations (#56)

YouTube 21.17.3 + YouMod v1.2.3

## Changelog
- Adds the hide Shorts shelf option back and Cleanup. (#52)
- Adds a option to replace next/previous buttons with forward/backward buttons.
- Adds a option to disable hints.
- Adds a option to forcibly enables miniplayer (especially kid videos).
- Adds a option to always show seekbar in fullscreen mode.
- Update French translations (#56)
